summary: Verified delivery_fee assignment, internal-delivery settlement, order-driver-info exposure of delivery_fee/order_total, and sales-report key 'توصيل داخلي'. All 4 backend pytest cases pass + the script-style driver-batching suite passes. Frontend data-testids confirmed in source code; live UI walkthrough was blocked by a global splash/login flakiness on the preview URL.

minor.issue: Endpoint path differs from the request statement which said '/api/reports/sales'. Correct path is /api/smart-reports/sales. Just a documentation discrepancy — functionality is correct (key 'توصيل داخلي' present when driver_cash_amount > 0).

integration_issues.flow: Admin login + delivery page UI walkthrough
integration_issues.issue: Could not reliably exercise /delivery → assign-fee-dialog from automation: the public preview occasionally landed on a long-running splash screen ('Maestro EGP' loader) and second-pass login left the form empty (autofill quirk on the data-testid login-email/login-password inputs whose 'name' attribute is set to the prefilled value, confusing automation).

After clicking submit, URL stayed at /driver-app — could not confirm wider container live (max-w-lg md:max-w-3xl xl:max-w-6xl is present in /app/frontend/src/pages/DriverApp.js source). Likely the seeded driver in the running DB has a different PIN than 1234.
Browser showed splash screen and did not render the tracking summary in time; could not visually verify track-order-summary. The selector exists in PublicTracking.jsx source (line 103).

action_items: Update problem statement / docs: the sales summary endpoint is /api/smart-reports/sales (not /api/reports/sales).

Main agent should self-test the live UI flow (admin login → /delivery → click driver button → assign-fee-dialog → fee=2000 → confirm) because automation hit a splash/autofill issue. All testids exist in source.
Confirm the seeded driver's PIN for 07801111111 in the running DB (driver-app login did not progress with PIN 1234).
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py is 23,640 lines — well over the 700-line guideline. Should be split into routers/services for maintainability.
paid_orders filter uses 'payment_status in [paid, credit, None]' which silently counts orders missing the field; consider requiring an explicit status to avoid stale legacy rows polluting reports.
Drivers assign endpoint relies on query params for delivery_fee/force — consider migrating to a typed JSON body for clarity.

Frontend: data-testid login-email/login-password have their 'name' attribute set to the displayed value (placeholder/value mirroring) — confused Playwright autofill. Consider stable name='email'/name='password'.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@maestroegp.com / admin123. Driver-app PIN login for 07801111111 with 1234 did not work in this environment.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned: 1 driver (سائق فرونت — only if absent, was already present) and 1 ready/unassigned delivery order (#9988, total 7500) for /delivery UI test. All test-prefixed orders removed after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression for delivery fee + internal-delivery is now fully covered by /app/backend/tests/test_delivery_fee_and_settlement.py (pytest) and /app/backend/tests/test_delivery_fee_extras_iter226.py (pytest). The sales report endpoint key is at /api/smart-reports/sales, not /api/reports/sales. For frontend UI testing, use [data-testid=login-email] / [data-testid=login-password] but be aware automated fill may need an explicit .click() before .fill() because the input 'name' attribute mirrors the current value.
rca of the issue: No bug — sales-report endpoint mislabeled in the test request. After correcting the path to /api/smart-reports/sales, the 'توصيل داخلي' key appears as expected once collect-payment runs (driver_cash_amount > 0 → by_payment_method['توصيل داخلي'] = amount, line 15305 in server.py).
